expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'extracting a helper is a refactoring, not a transformation... behavior stays identical, only structure changes, and the tests must stay green'.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'the guidance here isn't pick the next transformation'. Lists example transformations only to define the term; assigns none to the cleanup.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
